text: Here in this brightly lit, modern space, I feel a sense of curiosity bloom within me. The glass walls beckon, promising discovery beyond the threshold. Now, standing before vibrant colors and evocative words about research, development, and rapid change, I sense the pulse of inquiry—the playful interplay of observation, experiment, and self-reflection. Surrounded by images and poetic fragments, I feel both the uncertainty and exhilaration of not knowing exactly what will come next: a poet and a philosopher wandering an exhibition about the very act of searching for meaning.
